---
title: "eda"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

# Load packages and data
```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))

predictors_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
```

# Get last measured biomarkers
```{r}
ptau217_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ptau217)) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Date_taken, age, ptau217) %>%
  slice_tail() 

other_biomarkers_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(BIOMARKERS)) %>%
  select(-ptau217) %>%
  filter_at(vars(-CONP_ID), all_vars(!is.na(.))) %>%
  slice_tail() 

all_dat <- predictors_dat %>% 
  left_join((ptau217_last %>%
               select(CONP_ID, ptau217)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(other_biomarkers_last, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(gfap_log = log(gfap),
         nfl_log = log(nfl),
         ptau181_log = log(ptau181),
         ptau217_log = log(ptau217),
         ptau231_sqrt = sqrt(ptau231))
  column_to_rownames(var="CONP_ID")

all_dat_longer <- all_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = BIOMARKERS,
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) %>%
  # mutate(measure_norm = if_else(biomarker == "ab_ratio", measure, log(measure)))
  mutate(measure_norm = case_when(
    biomarker == "ab_ratio" ~ measure,
    #biomarker == "gfap" ~ sqrt(measure),
    #
    biomarker == "ptau231" ~ sqrt(measure),
    #biomarker == "ptau217" ~ sign(measure) * abs(measure)^(1/3),
    #biomarker != "ab_ratio" | biomarker != "ptau231" ~ ,
    TRUE ~ log(measure)))
```

# Checking for colinearity
```{r}
summary(all_dat$score_cogd)
hist(log(all_dat$score_cogd))

cor.test(all_dat$score_cogd, all_dat$score_libra2)
```
